title: Luxury Publishing Editorial Campaign Visual
sourceTitle: Assouline Publishing Editorial Campaign Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-premium 4:5 book SMM poster for Assouline x Timothée Chalamet, centered on L'EDITION. Subject: Timothée Chalamet wears black tailored blazer and gold ring, looking down while leaning over large open travel book on a mahogany table, with one hand resting on the page in a quiet luxury publishing pose. Scene: Wood-paneled reading room with warm bookshelf backlighting, mahogany table, large open travel book, premium paper textures, and canvas-weave book-jacket atmosphere. Composition: Fixed Instagram hero layout with monolithic bold serif ASSOULINE typography occupying most of the canvas, clean scarlet margins, catalog code tag, technical grid guides, top-left brand mark, central ASSOULINE typography, and restrained editorial spacing. Signature Elements: ASSOULINE typography, monolithic scarlet grid, open travel book, mahogany table, warm reading room, catalog code tag, technical guides, paper texture, and luxury publishing finish. Style: Ultra-premium book SMM poster, luxury publishing editorial campaign, monolithic book-jacket grid, bold spine lettering, premium canvas texture, Behance front-page quality, and cinematic reading-room polish. Color Palette: Fixed Scarlet Red, Monolithic White, Mahogany Brown, and Gold color system with warm bookshelf glow and rich paper neutrals. Lighting: Single warm overhead spotlight illuminating the book and hands, warm shelf backlight, rich paper highlights, and soft portrait shadows. Camera: ARRI Alexa Mini LF, 85mm lens feel, rich paper texture detail, canvas weave, shallow luxury editorial depth, and premium magazine framing. Typography: L'EDITION appears as the title; monolithic bold serif ASSOULINE typography anchors the master visual; ASSOULINE TRAVEL SERIES | LUXURY COVERS | COLLECTION COMPLETE appears as compact promotional text in the grid. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
